# Radikal Creative Technologies

> Radikal Creative Technologies (Radikal Createch) is a premium creative agency specializing in virtual photography, motion graphics, graphic design, and brand identity. Founded in 2024, we serve individuals, businesses, and content creators across Ghana, Nigeria, and the rest of West Africa.

## What We Do

- **Virtual Photography & Videography**: Studio-quality photos and videos without a physical studio visit. Professional headshots, creative portraits, graduation photos, product photography, and more.
- **Graphic Design & Brand Identity**: Complete brand visual identity including logos, marketing materials, social media assets, and corporate branding.
- **Motion Graphics & Animation**: Dynamic video content, animated brand assets, and creative motion design for social media and advertising.
- **Advanced Creative Technology**: Virtual try-ons, AI-enhanced imagery, 3D product rendering, and digital wardrobe styling.

## Who We Serve

- **Individuals**: Personal branding, professional headshots, graduation photos, social media content, and creative portraits.
- **Businesses**: E-commerce product photography, corporate branding, marketing visuals, social media management, and brand identity packages.
- **Content Creators & Agencies**: White-label photography services, portfolio enhancement, and creative partnership programs.

## Our Pillars

- **Class**: Premium visual language rooted in elegance and professional finesse.
- **Technology**: Advanced digital tools redefining creative possibilities.
- **Future**: Forward-thinking creativity anticipating market trends and evolving needs.

## Locations

- **Ghana**: Accra (Founding base)
- **Nigeria**: Lagos (Expanded market)
- Virtual-first model — we serve clients anywhere in the world

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2024
- Team Size: 2-9
- Average Client Rating: 4.9/5
- Average Delivery Time: 1-3 hours
- 700+ Happy Clients
- 24/7 WhatsApp Support
